description: Credential create (Admin): shared empty-username rejection and the POST body once confirmed. Required-field and confirm-gate text diverge (see report). Placeholder password kept short to stay out of the secret scanner.

cases.name: rejects empty username
cases.expect_error: username must be a non-empty string

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This creates a stored Managed credential. Set confirm=true to proceed.
